title: Zig INT8 quantization + quantized GEMM
description:
Implement per-channel INT8 quantization and INT8 tiled GEMM kernels.

zig/src/ops/quantize.zig:
- quantize_per_channel_int8: scale = max(|x|)/127, round(x/scale) → int8. Store scales per channel.
- dequantize_per_channel_int8: int8 * scale → f32
- Handle all-zeros channels gracefully

zig/src/ops/qmatmul.zig:
- INT8 tiled GEMM: A[M,K] int8 + scales_a[M], B[K,N] int8 + scales_b[N]
- Accumulate int8*int8 → int32, scale to f32 at tile boundary
- 8x8 micro-kernel with SIMD integer multiply-accumulate
- MUST include naive int8 triple-loop AND f32 GEMM for comparison

Tests (mandatory):
- test_quantize.zig: Round-trip error <= 0.5% per channel. Symmetric quantization. All-zeros channel.
- test_qmatmul.zig: INT8 vs f32 GEMM for 8x8, 64x64, 128x512, 512x512. Max relative error <= 1%.
- bench_qmatmul.zig: INT8 vs f32 on 512x512, 100 iters. Also end-to-end quantize+gemm+dequantize.

Pass/fail:
- Round-trip error <= 0.5% per channel
- INT8 GEMM >= 2x throughput vs f32 on 512x512
- INT8 GEMM output within 1% relative error of f32
- End-to-end >= 1.5x vs pure f32

Register in zig/build.zig.
